title: navarretia saximontana
intro: Navarretia saximontana, also known as Sax's pincushion or Sax's clustertop cloverbloom, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family that is native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of Navarretia saximontana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
